title: leymus pluriflorus
intro: Leymus pluriflorus, also known as big blue grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leymus pluriflorus include soothing sore throats, relieving congestion, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used as a natural remedy for various respiratory problems.
